title: Adding Hippa Compliance as a Add on for smaller businesses
excerpt: I would like to see if the developers would add hippa compliance to smaller companies. As of now, you would have to have 25 plus seats in order to access hippa compliance. I am part of a small insurance with 10 or less e…

posts.author: Stefan_Ash (Stefan Gephart)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to see if the developers would add hippa compliance to smaller companies. As of now, you would have to have 25 plus seats in order to access hippa compliance. I am part of a small insurance with 10 or less employees, so we are unable to access it. We love monday and want to use it, but this is crucial for us to be able to run our business.

This is the place to submit your feature request! Before submitting a new topic, please search to see if this request already exists and vote on that topic. If submitting a new topic, make sure you included the relevant tags and encourage others to vote on your feature idea.
